## Details

A detailed description of the code you need, where it will go on the website, how it will be used, related backend endpoints and how they're structured, etc. Be detailed here.

## Page link

Link to the page where this design will appear.

## Example screenshot

If a screenshot with your notes or to the original Balto Source could be useful for the artist to understand the request, provide them.
